---
title: ""
page-layout: article
---

# Hema Balarama

Economics PhD candidate, London School of Economics and Political Science  
{.meta}

I study inequality, gender and labor markets, and climate vulnerability in low- and middle-income countries.
{.lead}

## Research Interests

- Economic mobility and inequality
- Gender and labor market adjustment
- Climate shocks, vulnerability, and resilience
- Applied microeconomics for policy design

## Contact

- Email: [h.balarama@lse.ac.uk](mailto:h.balarama@lse.ac.uk)
- CV: available on request
- Google Scholar: link coming soon

## Sections

- [Research](research/index.qmd)
- [Teaching](teaching/index.qmd)
- [Writing](writing/index.qmd)
